reasoning: The Brooklyn Nets entered the 2025-26 season in a full rebuild having traded their main star Mikal Bridges previously. They hold the lowest betting odds in the NBA to win the championship (+100000) and are +50000 to win the Eastern Conference. With heavy competition in the East such as the reigning champion Celtics and the Knicks, and the Nets being firmly in a rebuilding phase primarily expected to lose games and acquire high draft picks, their true probability of winning the East is near zero (roughly 0.2% implied by betting odds). I am submitting the minimum allowed probability of 0.05.
